『Burberry Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry classic underarm bag,😀 now a hot vintage shop favorite, many bloggers and influencers are hunting for it. Even spending thousands on a pre-owned piece feels worth it. Size: 21/5/14cm, 1816

items.name_en: Burberry TB Small Exclusive Logo Leather Lock Bag, structured leather shoulder bag with smooth texture, featuring a lock decoration inspired by the Thomas exclusive logo. Easily transforms into a crossbody or handbag style. Dimensions: W21 x H16 x D6cm Removable and adjustable leather crossbody strap 1 external slip pocket; 1 zippered interior pocket 2 interior compartments Top flap with lock design Hand-painted edges Glossy metal hardware Made in Italy
